response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically broad individual contributor with roughly 15 years of software development experience, but the resume shows no evidence of engineering leadership, team management, or executive responsibility at any scale. The role requires a CTO who has grown engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, led multi-agent AI systems in production financial environments, and communicated architectural roadmaps to boards — none of which appear in this resume. His AI/agent exposure is limited to a two-month-old staff engineer role with vague contributions to MCP tooling, and his fintech experience (RIDE Capital, Optilyz pricing) is as an individual developer rather than an architect or leader.
strengths: Demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems work at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with low-latency requirements
Some fintech-adjacent exposure at RIDE Capital (investment platform) and Optilyz (pricing optimization), providing baseline domain familiarity
Active contributor to AI-agent and MCP tooling infrastructure at re:cinq, indicating awareness of the agentic stack
concerns: Zero evidence of engineering leadership: no team management, hiring, org design, or direct reports mentioned across the entire 15-year career
AI/agent experience is extremely shallow — started April 2025, described in generic terms with no production multi-agent systems, evaluation infrastructure, or LLM operational depth
No regulatory, compliance, or risk infrastructure experience; fintech roles were feature-delivery engineering, not credit, payment, or embedded-finance system architecture
